case_title: THAKOR, BALWANTSINH D vs. FROLUND, GLORIA et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAKOR, BALWANTSINH D SERVED MAR-05-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FROLUND, GLORIA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THAKOR, BALWANTSINH D RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FROLUND, GLORIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 520 SOUTH VAN NESS AVE, ROOM #224, LEASE FORFEITED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE D.R.V. IS $12.14 FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAKOR, BALWANTSINH D
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FROLUND, GLORIA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT FROLUND, GLORIA
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAKOR, BALWANTSINH D AS TO DEFENDANT FROLUND, GLORIA DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAKOR, BALWANTSINH D AS TO DEFENDANT FROLUND, GLORIA
